advanceSearch.labels.UNDER_AMENDMENT_REQ: Sous demande de modification de l'EFBT
Documentaire - tous les contrôles étaient strictement limités aux contrôles documentaires.
Physique - au moins un article faisait l’objet d’un contrôle physique (ou de tout autre type de contrôle que les contrôles documentaires).
errorMessage.ERR_01: Le pays de départ n'est pas égal au premier pays de la séquence de l'itinéraire contraignant.
errorMessage.ERR_02: Le pays de destination n'est pas égal au dernier pays de la séquence de l'itinéraire contraignant.
errorMessage.ERR_03: The current status of the transit declaration is invalid for this operation.
errorMessage.ERR_04: The specified discrepancy resolution type is invalid.
errorMessage.ERR_05: This declaration contains pending invalidation requests
errorMessage.ERR_06: This declaration is not a normal procedure without an approved place
errorMessage.ERR_07: Declaration ID must be either an MRN or a numerical ID.
errorMessage.ERR_09: Guarantee references must have status Pending.
errorMessage.ERR_10: Amount to be covered must be provided to register this guarantee reference.
errorMessage.ERR_11: Customs office of guarantee must be provided to register this guarantee reference.
errorMessage.ERR_12: Value of an element in a message is outside the predefined set of values or not part of the applicable technical code list (it is not facet-valid with respect to enumeration). This type of error is applicable to all elements with code values, so it is also applicable to those elements that identify a message type.
errorMessage.ERR_13: A mandatory/required element is missing in the received data, e.g. a required element is not present.
errorMessage.ERR_15: An element is not allowed to have a value because it is not allowed to be present according to the TMS message specification (including sequence of elements).
errorMessage.ERR_27: The value defining Code list CL027 indicator flag is invalid
errorMessage.ERR_35: Too many repetitions of a data group than the allowed.
errorMessage.ERR_39: Notification that the length of the element received exceeded the maximum length specified.
errorMessage.ERR_40: Notification that the length of an element received is shorter than the minimum length specified.
errorMessage.ERR_50: The value of the specific data item is invalid according to the type of this element. For instance, MRN does not conform to the specifications given in the convention.
errorMessage.ERR_51: The value of the specific data item is invalid with respect to the defined pattern for this specific type.
errorMessage.ERR_53: One (or more) character(s) used in a specific item is (are) not valid character(s).
errorMessage.ERR_54: The value of the element is numerically lower than the lowest limit defined for this data item. For instance, if the minimum defined value is 99, then any value lower to that limit will be invalid (e.g. 98).
errorMessage.ERR_55: The value of the element is numerically greater than the upper limit defined for this data item. For instance, if the maximum defined value is 100 then any value greater to that limit will be invalid (e.g. 101).
errorMessage.ERR_56: The value of the element is numerically lower than or equal to the lowest limit defined for this data item. For instance, if the minimum defined value is 99, then any value equal or lower to that limit will be invalid (e.g. 99).
errorMessage.ERR_57: The value of the element is numerically greater than or equal to the upper limit defined for this data item. For instance, if the maximum defined value is 100 then any value greater to that limit will be invalid (e.g. 100).
errorMessage.UIERR_01: Pas de demande en cours pour l'irrégularité spécifiée ou décision déjà donnée pour la demande en cours
errorMessage.UIERR_02: La demande d'invalidation n'a pas pu être traitée puisque le statut actuel n'est pas autorisé dans la liste des états.
errorMessage.UIERR_03: Departure transport means cannot be added after transition period expiry
